get.description:
Project get/add/delete/update
Projects are the building blocks
of processing. Each project can have zero or more tasks associated with it.
Users can fine tune the permissions on projects, including whether users/groups have 
access to view, add, change or delete them.

An optional "line" query param can be passed to retrieve
only the output starting from a certain line number.

An optional "limit" query param can be passed to limit
the number of lines to be returned

cluster_id.title: Cluster Id
cluster_id.description: Cluster Id this user is assigned to

is_superuser.title: Superuser status
is_superuser.description: Designates that this user has all permissions without explicitly assigning them.

username.title: Username
username.description: Required. 150 characters or fewer. Letters, digits and @/./+/-/_ only.

is_staff.title: Staff status
is_staff.description: Designates whether the user can log into this admin site.

is_active.title: Active
is_active.description: Designates whether this user should be treated as active. Unselect this instead of deleting accounts.

groups.description: The groups this user belongs to. A user will get all permissions granted to each of their groups.

items.description: The groups this user belongs to. A user will get all permissions granted to each of their groups.

name.title: Name
name.description: A label used to describe the preset

options.title: Options
options.description: Options that define this preset (same format as in a Task's options).

system.title: System
system.description: Whether this preset is available to every user in the system or just to its owner.

hostname.title: Hostname
hostname.description: Hostname or IP address where the node is located (can be an internal hostname as well). If you are using Docker, this is never 127.0.0.1 or localhost. Find the IP address of your host machine by running ifconfig on Linux or by checking your network settings.

port.title: Port
port.description: Port that connects to the node's API

api_version.title: API Version
api_version.description: API version used by the node

last_refreshed.title: Last Refreshed
last_refreshed.description: When was the information about this node last retrieved?

queue_count.title: Queue Count
queue_count.description: Number of tasks currently being processed by this node (as reported by the node itself)

available_options.title: Available Options
available_options.description: Description of the options that can be used for processing

token.title: Token
token.description: Token to use for authentication. If the node doesn't have authentication, you can leave this field blank.

max_images.title: Max Images
max_images.description: Maximum number of images accepted by this node.

engine_version.title: Engine Version
engine_version.description: Engine version used by the node.

name.title: Name
name.description: A label used to describe the project

description.title: Description
description.description: More in-depth description of the project

public.title: Public
public.description: A flag indicating whether this project is available to the public

public_edit.title: Public Edit
public_edit.description: A flag indicating whether this public project can be edited
